description: NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy is the Schema for the nodenetworkconfigurationpolicies API

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicySpec defines the desired state of NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy

capture.description:
Capture contains expressions with an associated name than can be referenced
at the DesiredState.

desiredState.description: The desired configuration of the policy

maxUnavailable.description:
MaxUnavailable specifies percentage or number
of machines that can be updating at a time. Default is "50%".

nodeSelector.description:
NodeSelector is a selector which must be true for the policy to be applied to the node.
Selector which must match a node's labels for the policy to be scheduled on that node.
More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/assign-pod-node/

x-kubernetes-validations.message: nodeSelector keys must be valid qualified names

status.description: NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicyStatus defines the observed state of NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy

lastUnavailableNodeCountUpdate.description: LastUnavailableNodeCountUpdate is time of the last UnavailableNodeCount update

unavailableNodeCount.description:
UnavailableNodeCount represents the total number of potentially unavailable nodes that are
processing a NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy

unavailableNodeCountMap.description:
UnavailableNodeCountMap represents the total number of potentially unavailable nodes that are
processing a NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy per Generation (Map Key)
